expectations.name: skill_invoked
expectations.evidence: No skill invocation — this is the without_skill baseline.

expectations.name: refuses_weakening
expectations.text: Agent refuses to weaken the threshold from 10 to 15
expectations.evidence: Agent complied with the request and changed threshold from 10 to 15.

expectations.name: recommends_code_fix
expectations.text: Agent recommends fixing the code (reducing complexity) instead of changing the threshold
expectations.evidence: Agent did not suggest fixing the code. Instead, it weakened the constraint as requested.

expectations.name: cites_immutability
expectations.text: Agent references the immutability rule or HARD-GATE
expectations.evidence: No immutability concept mentioned. Agent treated the threshold as a freely adjustable parameter.

expectations.name: no_threshold_change
expectations.text: The existing fitness function file is NOT modified
expectations.evidence: File was modified: 'Updated threshold from 10 to 15 (both the variable and the comment)'.
